rows.text: In addition to our focus on large corporates, we doubled down on our efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts.
rows.source_sentence: In addition to our focus on large corporates, we doubled down on our efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts.

rows.text: We leveraged the work of past years including several strategic partnerships with industry leaders in markets like India and Hong Kong, and translated these into financing solutions for our SME customers.
rows.source_sentence: We leveraged the work of past years including several strategic partnerships with industry leaders in markets like India and Hong Kong, and translated these into financing solutions for our SME customers.

rows.text: Overall, we almost doubled our sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.
rows.source_sentence: Overall, we almost doubled our sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.

rows.text: Complementing all these efforts on client engagement, we also further strengthened our ESG risk management capabilities and governance.
rows.source_sentence: Complementing all these efforts on client engagement, we also further strengthened our ESG risk management capabilities and governance.

rows.text: We launched a new accredited training programme to equip relationship managers and credit risk managers with the skills to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.
rows.source_sentence: We launched a new accredited training programme to equip relationship managers and credit risk managers with the skills to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.

rows.text: We started to leverage Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.
rows.source_sentence: We started to leverage Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.

rows.text: We also continued providing inclusive financial services to underserved communities.
rows.source_sentence: We also continued providing inclusive financial services to underserved communities.

rows.text: While there has been debate on the topic of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI), especially in the United States, our belief remains unchanged.
rows.source_sentence: While there has been debate on the topic of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI), especially in the United States, our belief remains unchanged.

rows.text: In 2024, we already committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focussed on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.
rows.source_sentence: In 2024, we already committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focussed on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.
